conventions_file_naming_1436418773900.content: The codebase uses kebab-case for utility files (e.g. format-date.ts), so dateUtils.ts was flagged as an exception.

facts_srcutils_1436420237247.content: When an existing file already implements the exact feature (format-date.ts), the plan chose to create new files as specified rather than modify or alias the existing one, to match task scope.

facts_testing_1436421598784.content: Existing tests in the codebase use vi.useFakeTimers() from vitest for time-based utilities; reuse this pattern for date formatting tests.

thoughts_pipeline_1436423445250.content: The pipeline expected 4 stages and PR creation; the plan stage must confirm complexity=LOW before proceeding to build.
